summary: Action checkout@v4 not pinned to SHA (security best-practice violation). Write-Version has inconsistent newline handling: version.txt uses -NoNewline, package.json uses default (adds newline). Workflow missing required test job, act-result.txt artifact generation, and test harness. PowerShell script well-structured with proper Set-StrictMode and error handling, but lacks parameter validation (CommitCount ≥1). Task explicitly requires test execution through act with fixtures and output assertions.
